diff: Until the Powerhouse system supports submitting Artifact Edit Proposals, AGENT7 token holders may submit Artifact Edit Proposals by posting them to the Sky Forum under the "Launch Agent 7 Prime" category. The title of the post must include the text "Launch Agent 7 Artifact Edit Proposal". The post must include cryptographic proof that the author controls an account holding the required percentage of the total Launch Agent 7 token supply specified in [A.6.1.1.8.2.2.2.2.1.2.1.1 - Root Edit Proposal Submission](fd43ac8d-5461-46e6-8902-4526ef677e3a).
